description: WorkflowTrigger is the Schema for the workflowtriggers API

apiVersion.description:
APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and
may reject unrecognized values.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description:
Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.
Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to.
Cannot be updated.
In CamelCase.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

spec.description: WorkflowTriggerSpec defines the desired state of WorkflowTrigger

disabled.description: Disabled disables the trigger without deleting it.

match.description: Match defines field-level conditions using JSONPath. All conditions must pass (AND logic).

items.description: WorkflowTriggerFieldCondition defines a field-level match condition.

path.description:
Path is a dot-path to a field on the K8s object, e.g. ".spec.replicas",
".spec.template.spec.containers.0.image". Array elements use .N syntax.

value.description: Value to compare against. Required for equals, not_equals, changed_to, changed_from.

run.description: Run defines what workflow to execute and how.

concurrencyPolicy.description: ConcurrencyPolicy defines how concurrent executions are handled.

delay.description: Delay is the duration to wait before executing.

parameters.description:
Parameters defines config values and tags passed to the workflow.
Config values support the Testkube expression language: {{resource.spec.replicas}}

config.description: Config maps config variable names to values or expressions.

tags.description: Tags maps tag names to values or expressions.

workflow.description: Workflow identifies which workflow(s) to execute.

labelSelector.description: LabelSelector matches workflows by K8s label selector.

matchExpressions.description: matchExpressions is a list of label selector requirements. The requirements are ANDed.

items.description:
A label selector requirement is a selector that contains values, a key, and an operator that
relates the key and values.

key.description: key is the label key that the selector applies to.

operator.description:
operator represents a key's relationship to a set of values.
Valid operators are In, NotIn, Exists and DoesNotExist.

values.description:
values is an array of string values. If the operator is In or NotIn,
the values array must be non-empty. If the operator is Exists or DoesNotExist,
the values array must be empty. This array is replaced during a strategic
merge patch.

matchLabels.description:
matchLabels is a map of {key,value} pairs. A single {key,value} in the matchLabels
map is equivalent to an element of matchExpressions, whose key field is "key", the
operator is "In", and the values array contains only "value". The requirements are ANDed.

name.description: Name matches a workflow by exact name.

nameRegex.description: NameRegex matches workflows by name regex.

wait.description: Wait defines stability gates that must pass before execution.

conditions.description: Conditions defines K8s resource conditions to wait for.

delay.description: Delay is the time in seconds between condition checks.

items.description: Items is the list of conditions to match.
WorkflowTriggerCondition defines a single condition to match.

reason.description: Reason is the expected condition reason. Optional.

status.description: Status is the expected condition status.

ttl.description: TTL is the maximum age in seconds for the condition to be considered valid.

type.description: Type is the condition type (e.g. Available, Ready).

timeout.description: Timeout is the maximum time in seconds to wait for conditions.

probes.description: Probes defines HTTP health checks to wait for.

delay.description: Delay is the time in seconds between probe checks.

items.description: Items is the list of probes to check.

headers.description: Headers are HTTP headers to send with the probe.

host.description: Host is the probe host. Default: pod IP or service name.

path.description: Path is the probe path. Default: /.

scheme.description: Scheme is the probe scheme (http or https). Default: http.

timeout.description: Timeout is the maximum time in seconds to wait for probes.

watch.description: Watch defines which K8s resource to observe. Optional for non-K8s trigger sources.

resource.description:
Resource identifies the K8s resource by Group/Version/Kind.
Group and Version are optional for well-known types (resolved via discovery API).

group.description: Group is the API group (empty for core resources like Pod, Service, ConfigMap).

kind.description: Kind is the resource kind (e.g. Deployment, KafkaTopic). Required.

name.description: Name matches the resource by exact name.

namespace.description: Namespace matches the resource by exact namespace.

version.description: Version is the API version. Optional for well-known types.

selector.description: Selector provides advanced resource filtering (regex, labels).

labelSelector.description: LabelSelector matches resources by K8s label selector.

matchExpressions.description: matchExpressions is a list of label selector requirements. The requirements are ANDed.

items.description:
A label selector requirement is a selector that contains values, a key, and an operator that
relates the key and values.

key.description: key is the label key that the selector applies to.

operator.description:
operator represents a key's relationship to a set of values.
Valid operators are In, NotIn, Exists and DoesNotExist.

values.description:
values is an array of string values. If the operator is In or NotIn,
the values array must be non-empty. If the operator is Exists or DoesNotExist,
the values array must be empty. This array is replaced during a strategic
merge patch.

matchLabels.description:
matchLabels is a map of {key,value} pairs. A single {key,value} in the matchLabels
map is equivalent to an element of matchExpressions, whose key field is "key", the
operator is "In", and the values array contains only "value". The requirements are ANDed.

nameRegex.description: NameRegex matches the resource name by regex.

namespaceRegex.description: NamespaceRegex matches the resource namespace by regex.

event.description:
Event is the K8s resource event type. Required when no other trigger source
(schedule, webhook, etc.) is configured. Validated at application level.

status.description: WorkflowTriggerStatus defines the observed state of WorkflowTrigger.
